title: Compare text in column
excerpt: Is there a way to compare text in a new item’s long text column with exisiting long text columns? Example; I create a new item with a Summary text column and I want to see if there are already items with similar text in …

posts.author: Korncobpipe (Molly)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to compare text in a new item’s long text column with exisiting long text columns? Example; I create a new item with a Summary text column and I want to see if there are already items with similar text in the same column. Thanks in advance

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Molly,

I am afraid this isn’t something that is supported natively. That said, are you able to elaborate a little further on your usecase? Are you looking to manage duplicate in your board? This might help me point you in the right direction

posts.author: Korncobpipe (Molly)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks for the response. I am trying to match similar text in a column when a new item is created. Does that help?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks for clarifying Molly!

I am afraid we don’t have native way to achieve this - I am sorry for the setback. I’d encourage you to explore our apps marketplace incase there are any third-party tools that can help you achieve this. I will be sharing your feedback internally with our team
